title: nepeta azadkouhensis
intro: Nepeta azadkouhensis, also known as Azadkouh Catmint, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Iran. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Nepeta azadkouhensis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Nepeta azadkouhensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
